steps.description: Click on the "Declarative Agent" option within the "New Project" dropdown menu to create an agent using instructions and actions.
Click on the "General Teams Agent" option within the dropdown menu titled "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" at coordinates (474, 210).
Click on the dropdown option "Tab" under the "Teams Capability" menu in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click on the "Default folder" dropdown input field in the "Workspace Folder" dialog to select or specify the project directory.
Press the F1 key to open the command palette in the Visual Studio Code interface with the "Explorer" panel active.
Type text 'Debug: Select and Start Debugging' into the Visual Studio Code command palette located at the top center of the interface.
Press the Enter key to select the highlighted "Debug: Select and Start Debugging" option in the Visual Studio Code command palette.
Type text into the Command Palette input field in Visual Studio Code: 'Debug in Teams (Chrome)'.
Press the "Enter" key to select the "Debug in Teams (Chrome)" option from the dropdown in the command palette of Visual Studio Code.
@assertion login m365 account pop-up is visible
